purpose: Template for compiling structured candidate proposals into executable workflow tasks.
required_structure: compile only proposals that passed cheap_screen
emit executable workflow config with explicit base factors and generated factor
attach source=candidate_generation and expected_information_gain to workflow payload
preferred_patterns: operator-specific compilation stays isolated in a dedicated compile function
compiled configs remain deterministic and reproducible
fingerprints derive from final config payload rather than ad hoc strings
discouraged_patterns: losing operator/base factor metadata during compilation
embedding candidate logic directly into planner without compiled config artifacts
acceptance_questions: Can this compiled candidate be traced back to its proposal?
Does the workflow payload preserve operator and base factor context?
Would a failed candidate still be auditable from generated artifacts?
